title: The Fed - Federal Open Market Committee
summary: This is the Federal Reserve's main FOMC information portal page, providing navigation links to FOMC meeting calendars, statements, minutes, transcripts, and related materials. The page does not contain substantive policy content itself but references a recent FOMC press conference on March 18, 2026.
key_points: This is a navigation/directory page for FOMC materials, not a source containing policy content
The page links to: About the FOMC, Meeting calendars, Transcripts, FAQs, and policy statements
References a recent FOMC press conference dated March 18, 2026
Contains links to policy documents including: FOMC Longer-Run Goals, Policy Normalization Principles, Recent Statement, and Recent Minutes
No specific rate decisions, economic projections, or policy signals are contained in this page itself
The page provides access to data, tools, and research sections related to Fed activities
why_it_matters: This page serves as the entry point for accessing official FOMC policy materials. Actual policy content (statements, minutes, decisions) must be retrieved from linked documents. As a navigation portal, it has no standalone archival value for market structure or macro catalyst analysis.

issues_found: Source type is navigation_page - per Rule 5, navigation pages must be rejected
Source is a portal/directory page providing links to FOMC materials rather than containing substantive policy content itself
No specific rate decisions, economic projections, policy signals, or market-relevant data present
event_type incorrectly set to 'unknown' when the page is clearly a navigation/index resource
The page references a March 18, 2026 FOMC press conference, but the actual policy content would be in linked documents (statements, minutes) not this page
Per Rule 6, navigation pages and thin low-signal sources bias toward reject

notes: LOW-VALUE SOURCE: This is a navigation/index page that provides links to FOMC materials rather than containing policy content itself. Per Rule 6, navigation pages should be flagged as non-archiveable. The page references a recent FOMC press conference (March 18 2026), suggesting recent activity on the FOMC calendar, but the specific policy details would be in linked documents. Recommend archiving specific FOMC statements or minutes from that date instead of this navigation page.
